claimText: University of Toronto recommends that instructors include a statement on their syllabus that informs students about expectations with respect to the use of AI, and provides sample syllabus statements for instructors to use.

citation.citationTitle: Generative Artificial Intelligence in the Classroom: FAQ's
citation.publisher: University of Toronto Office of the Vice-Provost
